summary: Comprehensive testing of P1 features: Enhanced Search Bar with yfinance Search API and News Grid Layout with Thumbnails. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly including search with Yahoo Finance-style results, 3-column news grid on News Feed and Stock Detail, 2-column compact grid on Dashboard, and thumbnail images from yfinance ticker news.
passed_tests: ✅ Global search: typing 'corvus' returns CRVS - Corvus Pharmaceuticals with Equity type and NASDAQ exchange
✅ Global search: typing 'apple' returns AAPL - Apple Inc. as first result
✅ Global search: typing 'tesla' returns TSLA with correct company name 'Tesla, Inc.'
✅ Search dropdown shows 'Symbols' header label above results
✅ Search results show symbol (bold/green), company name, type (Equity/ETF/Fund), and exchange on right
✅ Backend /api/search-stocks?q=corvus returns results with symbol, name, sector, exchange, type, industry fields
✅ Backend /api/search-stocks?q=micro returns Micron (MU) and other matches
✅ News Feed page at /news shows articles in a 3-column responsive grid (541.328px 541.328px 541.328px)
✅ Stock Detail page at /stock/AAPL shows news section with 3-column grid layout
✅ Backend /api/news/ticker/AAPL returns articles with thumbnail_url field populated
✅ Dashboard news section shows 2-column grid layout with compact news cards
✅ News cards with thumbnails display the image, headline, source, time, and sentiment badge
✅ News cards without thumbnails still display properly without broken layout
✅ Clicking a search result navigates to the correct /stock/{ticker} page
✅ Ctrl+K shortcut works to focus search input

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Enhanced Search and News Grid features working)

seed_data_creation: None required - uses live yfinance data and RSS feeds
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested and working. Enhanced Search uses yfinance Search API for natural language company name lookup (e.g., 'corvus' → CRVS). News thumbnails are extracted from yfinance ticker.news API for stock-specific news. RSS feed articles may not have thumbnails. NewsCard component handles both compact (Dashboard) and full (News Feed/Stock Detail) layouts with graceful fallback for missing thumbnails.

enhanced_search.yfinance_search_api: ✅ Returns rich metadata including symbol, name, sector, exchange, type, industry
enhanced_search.yahoo_finance_style: ✅ Results show symbol (green), name, type, exchange on right

news_grid_thumbnails.thumbnail_extraction: ✅ yfinance articles have thumbnail_url from thumbnail.resolutions
news_grid_thumbnails.thumbnail_display: ✅ Images display above headline in full cards
